selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 市长
words.definition: n. the head of a city government

words.translation: n. 管, 导管, 输送管, 管状器官, 声带, 尖细的声音, 烟斗, 笛, 管乐器；vt. 以管输送, 吹哨子, 吹奏, 尖声唱
words.definition: n. a tube with a small bowl at one end; used for smoking tobacco

words.translation: n. 街道, 马路, 街区；a. 街道的
words.definition: n. a thoroughfare (usually including sidewalks) that is lined with buildings

words.translation: n. 城镇, 市, 镇
words.definition: n. an urban area with a fixed boundary that is smaller than a city

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: a. 长的, 长久的, 冗长的, 做多头的；vi. 渴望, 热望, 极想
words.definition: a. primarily temporal sense; being or indicating a relatively great or greater than average duration or passage of time or a duration as specified

words.translation: num. 千；a. 成千的, 许多的
words.definition: n. the cardinal number that is the product of 10 and 100

words.translation: n. 会议, 委员会
words.definition: n. a body serving in an administrative capacity

words.translation: n. 眼睛, 视力, 看；vt. 看, 注视
words.definition: n. the organ of sight

words.translation: n. 一半, 半场, 不完全；a. 一半的, 不完全的, 部分的, 半场的
words.definition: n. one of two divisions into which some games or performances are divided: the two divisions are separated by an interval

words.translation: n. 头, 头脑, 领袖, 脑袋, 最前的部分；vt. 为首, 朝向, 前进, 用头顶
words.definition: n. the upper part of the human body or the front part of the body in animals; contains the face and brains

words.translation: n. 陆地, 地面, 地界, 地产, 国土, 土地；vi. 登陆, 登岸, 到达
words.definition: n. the land on which real estate is located

words.translation: a. 红的, 红色的, 红肿的, 流血的；n. 红色, 红颜料, 赤字
words.definition: n. red color or pigment; the chromatic color resembling the hue of blood

words.translation: n. 旁边, 侧, 方面, 胁, 侧边, 血统；a. 旁的, 侧的, 次要的
words.definition: n. a place within a region identified relative to a center or reference location

words.translation: n. 步骤, 步, 步幅, 脚步声, 踏级, 步伐, 短距离, 步态, 手段, 等级；vt. 踏, 以步测量, 跨步, 使成阶梯状
words.definition: n. the act of changing location by raising the foot and setting it down

words.translation: a. 确信, 必然的, 必定的；adv. 当然, 确实地, 无疑地
words.definition: s. physically secure or dependable

words.translation: n. 蓝色；a. 蓝色的, 下流的, 忧郁的
words.definition: n. blue color or pigment; resembling the color of the clear sky in the daytime

words.translation: adv. 以前
words.definition: s. gone by; or in the past

words.translation: adv. 离去
words.definition: s. not present; having left

words.translation: n. 门
words.definition: n. a swinging or sliding barrier that will close the entrance to a room or building or vehicle

words.translation: a. 容易的, 缓缓的, 舒适的, 从容的, 宽容的, 流畅的, 随便的, 自在的, 疲软的；adv. 容易地, 慢慢地
words.definition: a. posing no difficulty; requiring little effort

words.translation: n. 脸, 面容, 正面, 外观；vt. 面对, 朝, 正视, 面临
words.definition: n. the front of the human head from the forehead to the chin and ear to ear

words.translation: n. 绿色, 绿色颜料；a. 绿色的, 未成熟的, 新鲜的, 青春的, 无经验的, 脸色发青的
words.definition: n. green color or pigment; resembling the color of growing grass

words.translation: n. 金钱, 一笔款, 财富, 货币, 金额
words.definition: n. the most common medium of exchange; functions as legal tender

words.translation: n. 音乐, 乐曲
words.definition: n. an artistic form of auditory communication incorporating instrumental or vocal tones in a structured and continuous manner

words.translation: n. 救球；vt. 解救, 挽救, 储蓄, 保存, 节省, 保留
words.definition: n. (sports) the act of preventing the opposition from scoring

words.translation: n. 西方, 西部；a. 西方的, 向西的
words.definition: n. the countries of (originally) Europe and (now including) North America and South America

words.translation: a. 宽的, 广阔的, 普遍的, 宽阔的, 广泛的, 一般的；adv. 广阔地, 遍及各处地, 广泛地
words.definition: a. having great (or a certain) extent from one side to the other

words.translation: prep. 在旁边
words.definition: n. At the side of; on one side of.

words.translation: n. 外套；vt. 外面覆盖, 给...穿外套
words.definition: n. an outer garment that has sleeves and covers the body from shoulder down; worn outdoors

words.translation: a. 左边的, 左倾的, 左侧的, 左派的；adv. 在左面
words.definition: n. location near or direction toward the left side; i.e. the side to the north when a person or object faces east

words.translation: n. 黄色；a. 黄色的
words.definition: n. yellow color or pigment; the chromatic color resembling the hue of sunflowers or ripe lemons

words.translation: num. 五十, 五十个
words.definition: n. the cardinal number that is the product of ten and five

words.translation: n. 脑；vt. 打碎脑部
words.definition: n. that part of the central nervous system that includes all the higher nervous centers; enclosed within the skull; continuous with the spinal cord

words.translation: n. 公司, 合作, 法人团体
words.definition: n. a business firm whose articles of incorporation have been approved in some state

words.translation: n. 晚餐, 正餐, 宴会
words.definition: n. the main meal of the day served in the evening or at midday

words.translation: n. 山, 山脉, 大堆
words.definition: n. a land mass that projects well above its surroundings; higher than a hill

words.translation: adv. 请；vt. 使高兴, 合...的心意, 取悦
words.definition: v. give pleasure to or be pleasing to

words.translation: a. 贫穷的, 贫乏的, 不幸的, 可怜的, 拙劣的, 卑鄙的
words.definition: a. having little money or few possessions

words.translation: a. 富裕的, 富饶的, 浓厚的, 贵重的
words.definition: a. possessing material wealth

words.translation: n. 河, 江
words.definition: n. a large natural stream of water (larger than a creek)

words.translation: n. 微笑, 喜色, 笑容；vi. 微笑, 觉得好笑
words.definition: n. a facial expression characterized by turning up the corners of the mouth; usually shows pleasure or amusement

words.translation: n. 南方, 南；a. 南的, 向南的
words.definition: n. the region of the United States lying to the south of the Mason-Dixon line

words.translation: n. 木材, 木制品；vt. 植林于, 给...添加木柴
words.definition: n. the hard fibrous lignified substance under the bark of trees

words.translation: a. 能干的, 能够的
words.definition: a. (usually followed by `to') having the necessary means or skill or know-how or authority to do something

words.translation: vt. 接受, 承认, 同意, 相信, 赞成, 承担, 承兑, 采纳, 接纳, 容忍；vi. 同意
words.definition: v. consider or hold as true

words.translation: prep. 越过, 穿过, 与...相交叉, 在...的对面；adv. 交叉, 到另一边, 在对面, 成十字
words.definition: r. to the opposite side

words.translation: n. 空气, 旋律, 态度；vt. 晾, 使通风, 夸耀
words.definition: n. a mixture of gases (especially oxygen) required for breathing; the stuff that the wind consists of

words.translation: adv. 几乎, 差不多
words.definition: r (of actions or states) slightly short of or not quite accomplished; all but

words.translation: pron. 任何事
words.definition: n. Any object, act, state, event, or fact whatever; thing of

words.translation: vi. 出现, 显得, 来到
words.definition: v. come into sight or view

words.translation: n. 军队, 陆军
words.definition: n. a permanent organization of the military land forces of a nation or state

words.translation: n. 心跳(声), 打, 敲打声, 拍子；v. 打, 拍打, 打败
words.definition: n. a regular route for a sentry or policeman

words.translation: adv. 在后地；prep. 在...背后
words.definition: s. having the lower score or lagging position in a contest

words.translation: n. 少量, 马嚼子, 辅币；vt. 给马上嚼子, 控制
words.definition: n. a small fragment of something broken off from the whole

words.translation: n. 黑色, 黑颜料；a. 黑色的
words.definition: n. the quality or state of the achromatic color of least lightness (bearing the least resemblance to white)

words.translation: n. 身体, 人, 尸体, 主要部分, 团体；vt. 赋以形体
words.definition: n. the entire structure of an organism (an animal, plant, or human being)

words.translation: n. 褐色；a. 褐色的
words.definition: n. an orange of low brightness and saturation

words.translation: n. 生意, 事情, 业务, 商业, 商行, 职责
words.definition: n. a commercial or industrial enterprise and the people who constitute it

words.translation: vt. 买, 获得；vi. 买
words.definition: v. obtain by purchase; acquire by means of a financial transaction

words.translation: n. 进位, 射程, 运载；vt. 携带, 运送, 支持, 传送, 包含
words.definition: n. the act of carrying something

words.translation: a. 清楚的, 明确的, 澄清的；adv. 清晰地
words.definition: n. the state of being free of suspicion

words.translation: vi. 拉, 拖, 拔剑；vt. 拖拉, 挨近, 领取, 打成平局, 引导, 抽签决定, 画, 描写, 制订, 草拟, 吸引
words.definition: n. a gully that is shallower than a ravine

words.translation: n. 东方, 东；a. 东方的, 向东的
words.definition: n. the cardinal compass point that is at 90 degrees

words.translation: n. 充足, 够, 很多；a. 充足的, 足够
words.definition: n. an adequate quantity; a quantity that is large enough to achieve a purpose

words.translation: pron. 每件事物, 所有事物
words.definition: n. Whatever pertains to the subject under consideration;

words.translation: a. 远的, 久远的, 遥远的；adv. 甚远地, 很, 到很深的程度, 到很远的距离
words.definition: a. located at a great distance in time or space or degree

words.translation: n. 苍蝇, 两翼昆虫, 飞行；vi. 飞, 飞翔, 飘扬, 逃走
words.definition: n. two-winged insects characterized by active flight

words.translation: n. 脚, 步调, 英尺, 底部, 末尾, 步兵；vt. 走在...上, 给...换底, 支付
words.definition: n. the part of the leg of a human being below the ankle joint

words.translation: a. 自由的, 享受政治权力的, 允许的, 免费的, 丰富的；vt. 释放, 解放, 使自由
words.definition: n. people who are free

words.translation: n. 朋友, 支持者, 赞助者
words.definition: n. a person you know well and regard with affection and trust

words.translation: n. 未来, 将来；a. 将来的, 未来的
words.definition: n. the time yet to come

words.translation: n. 希望, 信心, 期待；v. 希望, 期望, 信赖
words.definition: n. a specific instance of feeling hopeful

words.translation: n. 小时, 钟头, 时间, ...点钟, 课时
words.definition: n. a period of time equal to 1/24th of a day

words.translation: n. 劳动, 努力, 工作, 劳工, 分娩；vi. 劳动, 努力, 苦干
words.definition: n a social class comprising those who do manual labor or work for wages

words.translation: vt. 遗失, 损失, 丢失, 使失去, 错过, 浪费, 迷失, 使迷路, 输去, 使沉溺于；vi. 受损失, 失败
words.definition: v. fail to keep or to maintain; cease to have, either physically or in an abstract sense

words.translation: n. 低点, 低价, 低, 牛叫声；a. 低的, 消沉的, 低等的, 浅的, 卑贱的
words.definition: n. an air mass of lower pressure; often brings precipitation

words.translation: n. 市场, 交易, 集市, 推销地区, 行情, 市面, 销路；vt. 在市场上交易, 使上市, 销售
words.definition: n. the world of commercial activity where goods and services are bought and sold

words.translation: n. 比赛, 火柴, 对手；vt. 使相配, 使比赛, 与...竞争
words.definition: n. lighter consisting of a thin piece of wood or cardboard tipped with combustible chemical; ignites with friction

words.translation: n. 月
words.definition: n. a time unit of approximately 30 days

words.translation: n. 移动, 迁居, 步骤；vt. 移动, 开动, 感动, 搬(家)
words.definition: n. the act of deciding to do something

words.translation: n. 给予(物), 出价, 提议, 意图, 报价；vt. 提供, 出价, 奉献, 试图, 使出现, 演出
words.definition: n. the verbal act of offering

words.translation: n. 油, 石油, 油画颜料；vt. 涂油于, 使融化成油状, 加油于
words.definition: n. a slippery or viscous liquid or liquefiable substance not miscible with water

words.translation: adv. 一次, 曾经, 一旦；conj. 一旦, 一经
words.definition: r. on one occasion

words.translation: n. 公开, 户外, 空旷；a. 开着的, 开放的, 开阔的, 营业着的, 公开的, 悬而未决的
words.definition: n. a clear or unobstructed space or expanse of land or water

words.translation: n. 外面, 外表, 外界；a. 外面的, 外表的, 外界的
words.definition: n. the region that is outside of something

words.translation: n. 薪资, 付款, 补偿；vt. 支付, 付清, 补偿, 偿还, 对...有利, 为...涂防水物
words.definition: v. give money, usually in exchange for goods or services

words.translation: n. 回来, 返回, 来回票, 归还, 报答, 利润率, 报告书；a. 返回的, 回程的, 报答的, 反向的, 重现的, 复原的
words.definition: n. a coming to or returning home

words.translation: n. 跑, 赛跑, 奔跑, 奔跑的路程, 趋向, 流出, 运转时间, 连续；vi. 跑, 奔跑, 跑步, 赛跑, 竞赛, 行驶, 运转, 进行, 蔓延
words.definition: n. a score in baseball made by a runner touching all four bases safely

words.translation: n. 秒, 瞬间, 第二名, 支持者, 助手；a. 第二的, 其次的, 次要的, 附加的, 辅助的
words.definition: n. 1/60 of a minute; the basic unit of time adopted under the Systeme International d'Unites

words.translation: vt. 卖, 背叛, 销售, 出卖；vi. 卖, 销售
words.definition: n. the activity of persuading someone to buy

words.translation: vt. 发送, 使进入, 寄, 派遣, 发射, 使陷于；vi. 寄信, 派人, 播送
words.definition: v. cause to go somewhere

words.translation: prep. 自...以后, 自...以来；adv. 自那时以后
words.definition: adv. From a definite past time until now; as, he went a month

words.translation: n. 停止, 车站, 逗留, 填塞, 障碍, (风琴的)音栓；vi. 停止, 被塞住
words.definition: n. the event of something ending

words.translation: n. 故事, 小说, 传奇, 描述, 阅历, 经历, 层
words.definition: n. a piece of fiction that narrates a chain of related events

words.translation: n. 队, 组；vt. 把马(牛)套在同一辆车上, 把...编成一组
words.definition: n. a cooperative unit (especially in sports)

words.translation: n. 顶部, 顶端, 极点, 上面, 上部, 顶篷, 最高地位, 首位, 陀螺；a. 最高的, 顶上的, 头等的
words.definition: n. the upper part of anything

words.translation: vt. 理解, 了解, 领会, 听说, 懂；vi. 懂得, 认为
words.definition: v. know and comprehend the nature or meaning of

words.translation: prep. 直到, 在...以前；conj. 直到...时, 在...以前
words.definition: prep. To; unto; towards; -- used of material objects.

words.translation: n. 拜访, 访问, 游览, 视察；vt. 拜访, 访问, 参观, 视察, 降临
words.definition: n. the act of going to see some person or place or thing for a short time

words.translation: n. 等待, 等候；vt. 等候, 期待, 延缓, 伺候, 推迟
words.definition: n. the act of waiting (remaining inactive in one place while expecting something)

words.translation: n. 墙, 墙壁, 垣, 内壁, 分界物, 屏障；a. 墙的
words.definition: n. an architectural partition with a height and length greater than its thickness; used to divide or enclose an area or to support another structure

words.translation: conj. 是否, 不论；pron. 两个中的哪一个
words.definition: pron. Which (of two); which one (of two); -- used

words.translation: n. 全部, 全体, 整体, 完全之体系；a. 所有的, 完整的, 完全的, 纯粹的
words.definition: n. all of something including all its component elements or parts

words.translation: a. 年轻的, 无经验的, 朝气蓬勃的；n. 青年们, 幼小动物, 崽
words.definition: n. any immature animal

words.translation: n. 圈套, 陷阱, 诡计, 存水弯；vi. 设圈套, 设陷阱
words.definition: n. a device in which something (usually an animal) can be caught and penned

words.translation: n. 吹, 打击, 殴打, 花开；v. 吹, 风吹, 吹响, 开花
words.definition: n. a powerful stroke with the fist or a weapon

words.translation: n. 小山, 丘陵, 小土堆；vt. 作成土堆, 堆成小丘
words.definition: n. a local and well-defined elevation of the land

words.translation: a. 高的, 长的, 夸大的；adv. 夸大地
words.definition: n. a garment size for a tall person

words.translation: prep. 直到, 在...以前, 迄；conj. 直到...为止
words.definition: n. unstratified soil deposited by a glacier; consists of sand and clay and gravel and boulders mixed together

words.translation: n. 街区, 木块, 石块, 块；vt. 阻塞, 封锁, 使成块状
words.definition: n. a solid piece of something (usually having flat rectangular sides)

words.translation: n. 男人, 朋友, 同事；a. 同伴的, 同事的, 同道的
words.definition: n. a member of a learned society

words.translation: vt. 建立, 创立, 铸造；find的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: n. food and lodging provided in addition to money

words.translation: n. 百, 百个东西；num. 百, 百个
words.definition: n. ten 10s

words.translation: n. 半升音调, 利刃, 骗子；a. 锋利的, 明显的, 敏锐的, 急剧的, 尖刻的, 严厉的, 刺耳的, 精明的
words.definition: n. a musical notation indicating one half step higher than the note named

words.translation: adv. 突然, 意外, 忽然, 迅速, 即席作成, 即刻, 急速
words.definition: r. happening unexpectedly

words.translation: a. 孤独的, 单独的, 独自的；adv. 独自地
words.definition: s. isolated from others

words.translation: n. 教堂, 礼拜, 教会；vt. 使人接受宗教仪式
words.definition: n. one of the groups of Christians who have their own beliefs and forms of worship

words.translation: n. 城市, 市
words.definition: n. a large and densely populated urban area; may include several independent administrative districts

words.translation: n. 厨子, 厨师；vt. 烹调, 煮饭, 加热
words.definition: n. someone who cooks food

words.translation: n. 叫声, 哭声, 大叫；vi. 哭, 叫, 喊
words.definition: n. a loud utterance; often in protest or opposition

words.translation: n. 跳舞, 舞蹈, 舞会；v. 跳舞
words.definition: n. an artistic form of nonverbal communication

words.translation: a. 死的, 不活泼的, 麻木的, 熄灭的；n. 死者
words.definition: n. people who are no longer living

words.translation: a. 深的；adv. 深入地
words.definition: n. the central and most intense or profound part

words.translation: n. 服装, 覆盖物；vi. 穿着
words.definition: n. a one-piece garment for a woman; has skirt and bodice

words.translation: n. 饮料, 酒；v. 喝, 喝酒
words.definition: n. a single serving of a beverage

words.translation: n. 滴, 微量, 落下, 空投；vi. 放下, 掉下, 下降
words.definition: n. a shape that is spherical and small

words.translation: n. 责任, 关税, 职务, 尊敬
words.definition: n. the social force that binds you to the courses of action demanded by that force; every opportunity, an obligation; every possession, a duty"- John D.Rockefel

words.translation: adv. 尤其, 特别, 格外
words.definition: r to a distinctly greater extent or degree than is common

words.translation: a. 出名的, 极好的
words.definition: s widely known and esteemed

words.translation: n. 农场, 农田；vt. 耕种
words.definition: n. workplace consisting of farm buildings and cultivated land as a unit
